content.name: HTML
contents: I understand the tags and their roles in HTML, and can read and understand the HTML Living Standard and HTML5 specifications.
I can create meaningful markup by using appropriate tags, and can pay attention to a structure that is easy to understand for search engines and screen readers.
I can use `aria-*` attributes appropriately to build an accessible website.
I understand the relationship between JavaScript and HTML (event propagation, DOM tree, Shadow DOM, etc.). I can use Web Components (custom elements, Shadow DOM).
I understand the impact of HTML structure on SEO.
I keep up with the latest trends in new technologies like HTML Modules and Declarative Shadow DOM.

content.name: CSS
contents: I understand the basic properties of CSS (selectors, box model, layout, color, font, text, animation, transition, etc.).
I understand CSS design techniques (BEM, OOCSS, SMACSS, Atomic Design, etc.).
I can design CSS with performance in mind (layout shift, hardware acceleration, etc.).
I can judge whether I can apply the latest CSS specifications to practice.
I can choose appropriate technologies without depending on specific CSS frameworks.

content.name: JavaScript
contents: I have a deep understanding of the language specification of JavaScript, and can use ES6 and later features.
I understand design patterns like modules, factories, singletons, and observers.
I understand module systems like ESM, CommonJS, UMD, etc.

I understand the web API and browser mechanisms (DOM, BOM, Event Loop, asynchronous processing, cross-origin communication, CORS, Cookie, Local Storage, Session Storage, IndexedDB, Service Worker, etc.).
I understand JavaScript performance improvements and security measures.
I keep up with the latest trends in JavaScript (ESNext, TC39 proposals, Babel, TypeScript, Flow, WebAssembly, etc.).

content.name: Vue.js
contents: I can use the Composition, Setup API of Vue3, and can lead the migration from Vue2.
I can use state management libraries like Pinia, Vuex, composables.
I can build advanced routing for SPAs using Vue router.
I understand how to optimize rendering and performance using v-once, v-memo, v-bind='object', virtual-scrolling, and keep-alive.
I understand design patterns like Container/Presentational and Atomic Design.

content.name: React
contents: I understand the mechanism of fast rendering with Virtual DOM.
I can use React Hooks, and can lead the migration from Class Component to Function Component.
I can use state management libraries like Redux, jotai, Zustand, Context API.
I can optimize API communication using data fetching libraries like React Query, SWR.
I can build advanced routing for SPAs using React Router.
I understand design patterns like Container/Presentational and Atomic Design.
I understand how to improve performance and security in React.

content.name: Next.js
contents: I understand the difference between App router and Pages router, and can design appropriate routing.
I understand rendering methods like SSR, SSG, CSR, RSC, and can choose appropriate methods.
I understand performance optimization techniques like image optimization, code splitting, pre-rendering, and caching strategies.
I can use data fetching methods like getStaticProps, getServerSideProps, getStaticPaths.
I can use API Routes and Edge Functions.

content.name: TypeScript
contents: I have deep understanding of the type system, including Generics, Conditional Types, Mapped Types, and Template Literal Types.
I have led TypeScript adoption in existing JavaScript projects, designing and executing incremental migration strategies.
I can create and maintain type definitions (.d.ts) for libraries and APIs.
I leverage type-level programming to catch runtime errors at compile time.
I understand tsconfig.json options thoroughly and can configure optimal settings for each project.

content.name: Node.js
contents: I understand Node.js core concepts including the event loop, streams, and buffers.
I have experience building API servers with frameworks like Express and Fastify.
I can manage npm/pnpm packages, set up monorepo configurations, and build publishing pipelines to internal npm registries.
I have experience running Node.js in serverless environments such as AWS Lambda.
I utilize Node.js for building CLI tools and build scripts.

content.name: Playwright
contents: I can design and implement cross-browser E2E tests across Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit.
I design maintainable tests using the Page Object Model pattern.
I build advanced test scenarios using network interception, mocking, and request validation.
I optimize Playwright execution in CI environments with parallel runs and retry strategies.
I leverage Playwright for visual regression testing and automated accessibility testing.

content.name: Vitest
contents: I can design and implement unit and component tests in Vite-based projects.
I use mocks, spies, and stubs effectively to ensure test isolation and reliability.
I have experience integrating Testing Library with Vitest for component testing.
I configure coverage reporting and CI integration for test quality visibility.
I have led the introduction of Vitest into projects that previously had no testing.

content.name: Docker
contents: I understand Dockerfile optimization (multi-stage builds, layer caching) and can build efficient images.
I can set up and manage local development environments using Docker Compose.
I have experience containerizing frontend applications and integrating them into CI/CD pipelines.
I have experience deploying containers on Kubernetes clusters.

content.name: Github Actions
contents: I can design and build CI/CD workflows to automate builds, tests, and deployments.
I can create custom actions and select appropriate third-party actions.
I optimize workflows using matrix builds, caching strategies, and parallel execution.
I have experience building automated deployment pipelines to GitHub Pages and Vercel.
I build secure CI/CD environments with proper secret management and environment variable handling.

content.name: AI Agents
contents: I integrate coding assistants like Claude Code and GitHub Copilot into my daily development workflow to boost productivity.
I have experience integrating AI features into frontends using the Vercel AI SDK and Anthropic SDK.
I understand prompt engineering fundamentals and can design and implement LLM-powered features.
I properly review and validate AI tool outputs to ensure quality and security.
I leverage AI agents for automated code review, test generation, and documentation.
